channel.title: Fruit on Paraguay4Life
channel.description: Recent content in Fruit on Paraguay4Life

item.title: Sweet Green Papaya: A Guide to Classic Paraguayan Dulce de Mamón
item.author: info@paraguay4life.com (Paraguay4Life)
item.description: Dulce de Mamón is the epitome of Paraguayan hospitality. In this article, you will learn how green papaya becomes a sweet delicacy.

item.title: Clericó: the fruity classic for celebrations and summer evenings
item.author: info@paraguay4life.com (Paraguay4Life)
item.description: A glass of Clericó brings Paraguayan summer feeling into your home - fruity, refreshing and perfect for sociable evenings.
